title: clang-10 complains: warning: bitwise negation of a boolean expression; did you mean logical negation?

features.name: bitwise NOT on chained OR of equality comparisons
features.description: Code should include a bitwise NOT operator (~) applied to the result of multiple OR-ed equality comparisons, producing a 1-bit boolean result that Verilator incorrectly translates to C++ using ~ instead of !

features.name: bitwise NOT on 1-bit equality result used in conditional
features.description: Code should include a bitwise NOT (~) applied to an equality comparison result used directly in an if-condition, where the single-bit boolean result causes Verilator to emit ~ rather than ! in generated C++

features.name: 2D packed array element in chained equality comparisons
features.description: Code should include a two-dimensional packed array whose element is accessed by constant indices and compared to multiple integer constants using OR-chained equality checks
